mapper.select: SELECT tlt.device_id, tlt.loop_number AS deviceName, tlt.version, ttnr.id AS tunnelId FROM tunnel_lamps_terminal tlt LEFT JOIN tunnel_lamps_edge_computing tlec ON tlec.unique_id = tlt.unique_id LEFT JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdt ON tlec.devicelist_id = tdt.devicelist_id LEFT JOIN t_tunnel_name_result ttnr ON tdt.tunnel_id = ttnr.id WHERE ttnr.status = 0 AND tlt.version = #{version} ORDER BY ttnr.create_time

SELECT tdt.* FROM tunnel_lamps_terminal tlt LEFT JOIN tunnel_lamps_edge_computing tlec ON tlec.unique_id = tlt.unique_id LEFT JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdt ON tlec.devicelist_id = tdt.devicelist_id LEFT JOIN t_tunnel_name_result ttnr ON tdt.tunnel_id = ttnr.id WHERE tlt.unique_id = #{uniqueId}
